compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

C:\\Users\\SAHIL KAJARE\\Desktop\\nhai\\.serviceRawFile:
# "org" ensures this Service is used with the correct Serverless Framework Access Key.
org: nhaihackathon
# "app" enables Serverless Framework Dashboard features and sharing them with other Services.
app: netra-app

service: netra-sync-service

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs18.x
  region: us-east-1
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:PutObject
            - s3:GetObject
            - s3:ListBucket
          Resource: 
            - "arn:aws:s3:::attendance-records-netra-virginia/*"
            - "arn:aws:s3:::attendance-records-netra-virginia"

functions:
  syncHandler:
    handler: handler.sync
    events:
      - http:
          path: sync
          method: post
          cors: true
          
  getPersonnelHandler:
    handler: handler.getPersonnel
    events:
      - http:
          path: personnel
          method: get
          cors: true

resources:
  Resources:
    NetraRecordsBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: attendance-records-netra-virginia
        BucketEncryption:
          ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
            - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
                SSEAlgorithm: AES256
